meta.description: Mixed Arabic/Latin text and preset functions — normalizeName, toSlug, toDisplayKey, isArabic, arabicRatio
meta.notes: Tests preset functions not fully covered by search_key.json or sorting.json. Supplements but does not duplicate existing fixtures.

cases.name: normalizeName: female name preserves ta marbouta
cases.notes: normalizeName does NOT convert ة → ه. Compare with toLooseSearchKey which does.

cases.name: normalizeName: alef maqsoura (ى) is preserved
cases.notes: ى (U+0649) is linguistically meaningful in names — normalizeName does NOT convert it to ي

cases.name: normalizeName: Persian Yeh (ی) is normalized to Arabic Yeh
cases.notes: ی (U+06CC) → ي. Persian Yeh is an encoding artifact, unlike ى which is linguistically distinct.

cases.name: normalizeName: alef maqsoura mid-word preserved
cases.notes: Both ى occurrences preserved — normalizeName does not normalize alef maqsoura

cases.name: toSlug: city name with ta marbouta converted
toSlug: single word with ta marbouta
toSlug: mixed Arabic and Latin — Latin lowercased
toDisplayKey: removes tatweel, preserves tashkeel
cases.notes: removeTatweel only — tashkeel preserved unlike toSearchKey

cases.name: toDisplayKey: stretched name with embedded Latin
toDisplayKey: preserves hamza and alef variants
cases.notes: toDisplayKey does NOT normalize alef or remove tashkeel — only removes tatweel

cases.name: isArabic: pure Arabic text returns true
isArabic: mixed text with Arabic returns true
